name: Bean-And-Corn Chili Over Puffed Tortilla (Lf)
recipeIngredient: Check package for ones without lard
15 1/4 oz Kidney beans (reserve 1/4 cup of liquid)
4 oz Mild green chilies, chopped and drained
3 oz Monterey Jack Cheese, lowfat, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange tortillas on foil-lined baking sheet.
2. Bake at 450°F for 4 to 5 minutes until puffed and lightly golden. Reserve.
3. In a 12-inch nonstick skillet over medium heat, sauté onion and garlic in oil for 3 to 4 minutes.
4. Add tomatoes, cumin, black pepper, red pepper flakes, kidney beans, and reserved liquid.
5. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring often.
6. Add green chilies and cook for an additional minute.
7. Stir in corn and cook for another minute.
8. Place a tortilla on each plate.
9. Mound about 3/4 cup of chili over each tortilla.
10. Sprinkle with 1/4 of the cheese.
11. Serve accompanied by the remaining green chilies.
